name: Queso Fundido w/ Chorizo Casserole Dip (Cheese Fondue)
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique Brand Queso Blanco cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chorizo and drain off excess fat.
2. Place the chorizo in an oven-safe casserole dish.
3. Grate the Queso Blanco over the top of the chorizo.
4. Bake in a 350ºF (175ºC) oven until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
5. Serve with corn tortillas or tortilla chips.
